reviews.评论: My cats did not like it, sorry.
Bag of food was torn open and taped up. Not fresh. Garbage.

My cat has eaten everything under the sun and has never had a single issue. I switched to this cat food and my cat started excessively drooling and then his entire mouth swelled up a few days later. Then he started breathing heavily and it sounded like he could barely take another breath. It all boiled down to the food. I switched his food and within the day he stopped drooling and his mouth started to de-swell shortly thereafter. I have no idea what chemical was in the food but they should recall it.
The last 4 bags I received have not been sealed and cat food is scattered everywhere in the box. As an elderly person, it’s very hard for me to get it all cleaned up and back in the bag.

reviews.标题: It worked more for stray cats than for mine
reviews.评论: I have several cats at home and I bought this Meow Mix Original hoping they would like it, but honestly it wasn‘t like that. My domestic cats almost didn’t want it; they smelled it and left the plate almost complete. However, the stray cats that come to my yard do eat it without problem, so at least it is not wasted.The price is fine, but I wouldn’t buy it again for my cats inside because they just didn’t like the flavor or texture. It may be useful for less demanding cats, but it didn’t work for mine.
All of a sudden my cats act like they are starving. The recipe has changed and unfortunately I’ve had to no longer use this brand

I got this for a friend and the TNR cats that she helps to feed and she said all of a sudden they stopped eating the meow mix the last two bags I wouldn’t touch she had to get something else and I had another friend say the same thing so I don’t know if they changed the formula or what.

reviews.标题: Exactly that the arrival time promised will be kept.
reviews.评论: I was expecting this delivery today. Saying we‘re sorry won’t feed my hungry cats. Very disappointed. 😣 The product itself is very good.

I bought this dry food for a neighborhood cat for the occasional times she comes by my door. I was feeding her my canned tuna fish, but didn’t want to do that anymore, so I got her this. She DID NOT like it. I even tried to moisten it up with some water - NOPE! lol
She’s clearly spoiled and I’m not the only one feeding her, so I chucked the deuces and bought several cans tuna and chicken. I don’t know what to do with this bag of food as I don’t know any cat parents. It may be good for hard rode street cats, but not for this one. Lol
My cats do not like this food.
made my cat sick
Don‘t waste your money on their product in the little plastic tubs. My cat that will eat almost anything; will only lick the gravy off this stuff!! :-(

I just received this product and my dog won’t eat it she turns his  head away so I put it in his food and he won’t even touch it. After the reviews of dogs dying and have seizure is so heartbreaking 💔. I will not force it on him again will return. So sad to hear about all the dogs that went thru this .
Did nothing seen no difference see no change. Nothing as advertised about this product for three different dogs and two different breeds. Would not recommend.
I bought this for my senior dog and he has has diarrhea and throwing up. Not sure what is happening but it horrible.
Spent a lot of money on this after reading the reviews and gave my dog 3 bottles and there have been no changes…waste of money

reviews.标题: It is REFUNDABLE but not returnable
reviews.评论: If I could put a zero I would put 0 Stars. Product is not the same as it used to be before either they put less molasses or less quality that they‘re trying to sell at a cheaper price but not stating that this is old inventory. My dog has been vomiting from this product as not the same from couple of months ago. Darker and sticky is original. Old rancid and crumbles is OLD
Product received all stuck in one big clump. Unusable

I had gotten 3 of these tubs and each one came to me as a huge globy mess of treats. I don‘t know what happened but it looked like a got monkey bread in a container. 1 of them even came in covered in mold. Save your money and get something else.
Didn‘t do a thing for my bulldog and after reading the reviews, I can‘t in good faith give him this and risk his health.

reviews.标题: Hard to use, replace with usable product
reviews.评论: Arrived yes, not great they r all stuck together in a clump, break apart when try to use, not satisfied. It seems as it has been sitting on ur shelf to long. They should be moist, easy to accessReally disappointed, so farthank youps quick delivery is one thing, good.But delivery of hard to use product that isn‘t cheap. remains to be seen as to quality of crumbly product!
IF I COULD GIVE UT A ZERO I WOULD. MY DOG SUFFERED 3 SEIZURES.  VET VERIFIED CAUSED BY THIS PRODUCT!!!THROW IT AWAY IMMEDIATELY!REPORTED TO AMAZON AS UNSAFE!!

Worst digestive upset my dog has ever had. Waste of money, switching back to another supplement. It was so bad, had to bring to the vet. Took days to get out of his system, with continuous digestive upset. Ruined carpeting and a 100 crate mat.

reviews.标题: Money Back Guarantee is a scam
reviews.评论: Money Back Guarantee is a scam! My dog was suffering from liquid diarrhea several times a day and lethargic from not feeling well. Customers service response? Because its effective in most dogs, they can only offer a 40% refund. Absolutely ridiculous.  Buyer beware.

reviews.标题: The joint treats were very old crumbly and not chewy at all
reviews.评论: It was horrible, I opened the jar and it looked like someone had had a handful of them and shoved them in the jar and they‘re all mushed together
I bought this for my 7 year old dog (who has joint problems) unfortunately, the supplements smelled so awful that my dog absolutely would not try it.

reviews.标题: G a r b a g e
reviews.评论: Dry old and stuck together, repulsive smelling. Not going to feed my dog this, enjoy the 35 dollar grift since I cant refund this product.
Not sure it helped. Finally had to discontinue due to price.
All the chews are stuck together.  Break and crumble when trying to break apart.

These have to be old. They are hard, not soft, like others I’ve ordered.
